messages.content:
<view class="" v-for="(item,index) in boke" >
			<u-card :title="item.articleTitle" :sub-title="item.publishDate" :full="true" :border="false" :padding="20" margin="10rpx"
				:footBorderTop="false" :footStyle="footStyle" @click="toDetail(item.id)">
				<view class="" slot="body">
					<view class="u-body-item u-flex u-border-bottom u-col-between u-p-t-0">
						<view class="u-body-item-title u-font-sm u-line-3">{{item.articleSummary}}</view>

					</view>
				</view>
				<view class="" slot="foot">
					<u-icon name="thumb-up-fill" size="32" color="#2BC3C8" :label="item.likes+'点赞'" labelSize="24"
						class="u-m-r-30"></u-icon>
					<u-icon name="star-fill" size="32" color="#2BC3C8" :label="item.collects+'收藏'" labelSize="24"></u-icon>
					<u-icon size="32" color="#2BC3C8" :label="'作者：'+item.author" labelSize="24" class="zuoze"></u-icon>
				</view>
			</u-card>
			<u-gap bgColor="#ededed" height="20"></u-gap>
		</view>
这里的循环如何根据publishDate及发布时间先后来循环

<view class="" v-for="(item,index) in boke" >
<u-card :title=“item.articleTitle” :sub-title=“item.publishDate” :full=“true” :border=“false” :padding=“20” margin=“10rpx”
:footBorderTop=“false” :footStyle=“footStyle” @click=“toDetail(item.id)”>
<view class=“” slot=“body”>
<view class=“u-body-item u-flex u-border-bottom u-col-between u-p-t-0”>
<view class=“u-body-item-title u-font-sm u-line-3”>{{item.articleSummary}}</view>

</view>
</view>
<view class=“” slot=“foot”>
<u-icon name=“thumb-up-fill” size=“32” color=“#2BC3C8” :label=“item.likes+‘点赞’” labelSize=“24”
class=“u-m-r-30”></u-icon>
<u-icon name=“star-fill” size=“32” color=“#2BC3C8” :label=“item.collects+‘收藏’” labelSize=“24”></u-icon>
<u-icon size=“32” color=“#2BC3C8” :label=“‘作者：’+item.author” labelSize=“24” class=“zuoze”></u-icon>
</view>
</u-card>
<u-gap bgColor=“#ededed” height=“20”></u-gap>
</view>
这里的循环如何根据publishDate及发布时间先后来循环
可以在<view class="" v-for="(item,index) in boke" >中加key吗

是的，你可以在`<view>`元素中加入`key`属性来提供循环列表的唯一标识符。这有助于Vue更准确地跟踪和管理每个循环项的状态。推荐使用循环项的唯一标识符作为`key`值，例如可以使用`item.id`作为`key`。

下面是在循环中添加`key`属性的修改后的代码示例：

```html
<view class="" v-for="(item,index) in boke" :key="item.id">
  <!-- 循环内容 -->
</view>
```

确保将`key`绑定到循环项的唯一标识符上，这样可以确保在循环过程中保持正确的组件状态。
请在<view class="" v-for="(item,index) in boke" >中加key来实现根据日期排序功能 日期形式为2023-08-01

Property or method "getTimestamp" is not defined on the instance but referenced during render. Make sure that this property is reactive, either in the data option, or for class-based components, by initializing the property
这没有实现根据时间先后来排序

Property or method "sortByPublishDate" is not defined on the instance but referenced during render. Make sure that this property is reactive, either in the data option, or for class-based components, by initializing the property. See: https://vuejs.org/v2/guide/reactivity.html#Declaring-Reactive-Properties.
